versions.changes_summary: Added nuanced policy allowing controlled read access to essential protected files like AGENTS.MD when explicitly required by authorized agents. Introduced requirement for justification, logging, and enforcing read-only access in such cases. Added a section on providing clear feedback and secure pathways when access is blocked. These changes improve flexibility in handling essential files while maintaining strict protections.

Added explicit instructions for providing clearer feedback and error codes when blocking access, including reasons and secure alternatives or escalation paths to enable adaptive replanning by execution agents. Clarified that read access to protected files (including README.md) may be allowed under controlled, justified, and logged conditions. Introduced guidelines for agents to flag mandatory protected resources early to facilitate coordination between security and execution agents. Added provisions for flexible policies or escalation mechanisms permitting controlled access to protected files under safe contexts. Preserved all existing rules and restrictions unchanged.
